title: Location location location
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Why travel to the mall for...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - Why travel to the mall for your cellular needs when you can enjoy the same quality products, unbeatable convenience and exceptional service at the Vodacom Shop, 34 York Street?

Our knowledgeable staff are dedicated to providing a seamless experience.


> Our team will offer the top-notch service you deserve without the hassle, whether you're


- taking out a new contract
- upgrading your existing contract
- needing a sim swop or E-Sim
- wanting a prepaid solution
- paying your account
- handing in your device for a software upgrade or repair.

The pre-order campaign for the much-anticipated Samsung Galaxy S24 started in store on 18 January and will run till 6 February.

Customers can trade in their old phone and get up to R15 000 when they upgrade. The S24 Series comes in S24 Base & S24 Plus & S24 Ultra. As part of the pre-order campaign, customers can add one of the two add-ons to their contract - either the Samsung Galaxy Tab S9 FE (@R99x36 months) OR the Samsung Galaxy Watch6 eSIM (@ R69x 36 months).

Visit the Vodacom Shop at 34 York Street, George to find out more.

STAND A CHANCE TO WIN a Vodacom hamper when you visit the Vodacom shop and place your till slip into the entry box between 25 January and 25 February. Ts & Cs apply

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
